tweets.text: Nice catch Old Patrol!  I hadn’t seen this one!!  Hernando Arce was asking for a breakdown - so let’s start at 12 million forty years ago.  No net loss of illegal aliens during that time, just massive increases each year.  Some years millions. For sake of stats, say it amounted to a million a year.  That’s 50 million right there, pre Biden.  Then the greatest influx of illegal aliens this country has ever seen from AROUND THE WORLD.  Some estimates at 20 to 30 million, however we have not a clue as 80% of border was unmonitored for 4 years!  Probably more than that.  That’s 80 million, minumum.  .  Another 20 million refugees , visa overstays and other an and we arrive at 100 million.  These numbers must coincide with common sense ( the scientific method always relies on common sense).  That common sense was the horror we saw on the ground nationwide.  Entire sections of major cities FILLED with illegal aliens.  No part of America is free from this.  100 million, easy.  We have a massive problem, Old Patrol

tweets.text: It started at 10 million 30 years ago with millions a year entering since then under all administrations ( except Trump), culminating in  20 to 30 million additional under Biden alone.  Given on the ground assessments across all major regions of the US in conjunction with both scholarly estimates and empirical evidence indicating 30 to 50 million as far back as 2012, the conservative number sits at 100 million.  Could be more.
